name: omegle-clone-workspace
description: Full-stack Omegle clone with WebSockets, WebRTC and Glassmorphism design

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); cp.spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './server', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); cp.spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: './client', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
